headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights J.B. Hunt, Knight-Swift and ArcBest
summary: KNX, ARCB and JBHT are highlighted as trucking stocks benefiting from improving freight demand, tighter capacity and AI-driven efficiency gains.
